budget: One bounded Codex-lane implementation card for Linear META-23. Preserve ToolSpec's exact local or mcp:<server> origin through deterministic OpenAI schema rendering into the live context manifest. Add a provenance-aware schema record/draft path without changing the existing openai_schemas() return contract or the provider-facing tools payload. Emit one manifest entry per transmitted tool schema so mixed local and MCP schemas retain separate source kind, exact stable source identity, trust, redaction, hashes, and receipts; reconstruction must remain byte-identical to the transmitted schema list. Local caller-authored policy schemas remain TOOL_POLICY_SCHEMA/INSTRUCTION. MCP schemas are a dedicated external/MCP source kind with UNTRUSTED_EVIDENCE, and typed model validation forbids laundering that source kind to INSTRUCTION. Preserve deterministic ordering/deduplication, schema redaction, aggregate wire-byte budgeting, tool execution, tool-round behavior, manifest hashing, historical manifest validation, and all routing/evaluator/deployment authority outside this H-plane provenance correction. E and W remain frozen.
stopCondition: Stop and fail closed on any provider tools-payload change, MCP load/call regression, schema order or deduplication drift, manifest reconstruction divergence, loss of exact MCP server/tool identity, MCP schema attested as INSTRUCTION, source-controlled trust, provenance metadata entering provider bytes or budget counts, secret leakage, historical manifest-hash incompatibility, unrelated context/memory behavior change, evaluator/merge/promotion/deployment/credential/runtime authority grant, owned-path expansion, failing acceptance command, or unresolved independent-review P0/P1 finding.
evaluatorAuthority: The implementing seat cannot self-approve. Deterministic tests must prove exact wire compatibility, mixed-origin per-tool reconstruction, MCP trust non-escalation, redaction, budget parity, round-to-round provenance, and invalid-input rejection. The Codex orchestrator inspects the exact diff and test evidence. A distinct coordinator may integrate only after a read-only Pi/NeuralWatt GLM-5.2 review of the immutable base/head diff reports no unresolved P0/P1 findings. Human promotion and deployment authority remain unchanged.
nextCheckpoint: Failing tests first prove a mixed builtin/MCP registry preserves the exact deterministic provider schema list while its live manifest emits separate per-tool entries with TOOL_POLICY_SCHEMA/INSTRUCTION for builtin and MCP_TOOL_SCHEMA/UNTRUSTED_EVIDENCE for MCP; reconstruction equals sent bytes; forged MCP INSTRUCTION provenance is rejected before a model call.
